title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Indiabulls Real Estate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Indiabulls Real Estate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
